title: Cherry Panorama
description: A Resource Pack That Adds A Cherry Grove Panorama
body:
![Cherry Grove Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6edf9016c7211aefabe290498d65548212a361b.png)

Ever felt like you wanted the Cherry Grove panorama back from 1.20?

That's what this resource pack does, but it makes it look even prettier with shaders!


[Seed] 1961771841930347630

[Coordinates] 917 137 -403
